title: Arlong Measures the Enemy
description: On pages 15–18, arlong measures the enemy focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Usopp answer Nami’s plea and march toward Arlong Park together.
scene: On pages 15–18, arlong measures the enemy focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Usopp answer Nami’s plea and march toward Arlong Park together.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So your goal from the very beginning,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Was only to get Nami, is that it...?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Just what could 4 Measly Humans do!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: As if Arlong would fight the likes of you! I'll turn you all into fish food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The Monster from Grand Line that De- Stroyed Gosa!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: So he's one of them, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The hell do you think you're doing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well, if you are going to run away,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I ain't gonna try to stop you but...

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
